home.title: 冰箱
home.emptyDescription: Click “New ice box” above to create your first backup profile.

create.title: Create ice box
create.description: Creating an ice box also prepares its backup branch and Skill document.
create.name: Ice box name
create.gitDirectDescription: OpenClaw pushes directly, great for frequent automatic sync.
create.uploadTokenDescription: No Git setup required. Package and upload on demand.
create.uploadEncryptionDescription: Only applies to “Archive upload”. Encryption happens locally before upload.
create.hintPlaceholder: Example: the long passphrase for the old MacBook
create.saveNote: This creates the matching branch: `{branch}` and syncs the ice box config.

errors.minKeyLength: Master key must be at least 12 characters. A long passphrase is recommended.
errors.keyMismatch: The two master keys do not match.
errors.needGitConfig: Configure the Git repository before creating an ice box.
errors.fillName: Start with the ice box name and we'll help generate the machine-id.
errors.invalidMachineId: machine-id must keep at least one letter, number, or hyphen.

detail.loadFailed: Failed to load ice box details
detail.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the ice box. Please try again later.
detail.restoreNeedGit: Save and test the Git repository on the home page first so restore knows where to fetch backups.
detail.restoreNeedTarget: Set the restore target directory first. Actual data will be restored into its `.openclaw` folder.
detail.restoreNeedConfirm: You need to confirm restore before it can run.
detail.restoreNeedOverwrite: An existing `.openclaw` folder was found. Confirm overwrite after backup before restoring.
detail.deletedDescription: Taking you back to the list. Freezer cleaned up nicely.
detail.notFoundDescription: This device may not have synced local storage yet, or the ice box has not been created.
detail.localOnlyTitle: This ice box currently only exists locally and is not confirmed on the remote yet.
detail.reminderSaved: Reminder settings saved. Next reminder time and status are now refreshed.
detail.reminderReset: Reminder settings reset to the default weekly reminder.
detail.includeGitCredentialPlaceholders: Include Git credential placeholders when installing the Skill
detail.recoveryCommand: One-click restore command for a new machine
detail.historyNeedGit: Save and test the repository connection on the home page first so backup history can be loaded from the remote repository.
detail.cachedHistoryDescription: Background refresh failed this time. You can keep using the cached records for now and try again later.
detail.noHistoryTitle: This ice box has no backup history yet
detail.noHistoryBranchDescription: It will appear here after the first backup. The matching remote backup branch has not been created yet.
detail.noHistoryReadyDescription: The remote branch is in place, but no commit has been found yet. Once the first backup lands in the repository, the history list will appear here.
detail.restorePanelBadgeDescription: Restore the selected `.openclaw` snapshot into a target directory on this machine
detail.restoreDescription: This is not a doc card. It is the real local restore entry point: it reads the selected snapshot from the repository and writes it back into the target directory’s `.openclaw` folder.
detail.restoreStep1Description: Choose the version you want to restore from Backup history.
detail.restoreStep2Description: Confirm the target directory, target commit, and the backup path created before overwrite.
detail.restoreStep3Description: Check the confirmation box before running, so you do not restore the wrong snapshot to the wrong directory.
detail.switchToLatestSnapshot: Switch back to the latest snapshot
detail.restoreSourceLatest: {mode} → latest snapshot on the Git branch
detail.confirmRestoreText: I confirm restoring the `.openclaw` folder from {source} into the target directory above.
detail.latestSnapshotInBranch: the latest snapshot on this branch
detail.overwriteConfirmation: If the target directory already contains `.openclaw`, back up the existing folder first and then overwrite it during restore.
detail.noRestorableSnapshot: There is no restorable snapshot yet
detail.awaitingRestorePath: Will be generated after you fill in the target directory
detail.noRestorableBranches: No restorable `ice-box/...` branches have been found in the current repository yet.
detail.deleteDescription: Deleting it removes it from the local ice box list
detail.confirmDeleteDescription: It disappears from the ice box list on this device immediately after deletion.
detail.removeFromLocalList: Remove this ice box from the local list.

gitConfig.title: Git config
gitConfig.description: Enter the repository info and test it directly. The initialize button only appears after confirming `{branch}` does not exist.
gitConfig.branchExists: Exists. You can go straight to the ice box list.
gitConfig.initializeHint: Connection passed, but `{branch}` is not in the repository yet. Click initialize above to continue.

healthy.label: Healthy
healthy.description: The latest backup completed successfully and things look stable.

syncing.label: Syncing
syncing.description: A backup is running or the latest snapshot is still being written.

attention.label: Needs attention
attention.description: The latest backup had issues. Worth checking soon.

synced.label: Synced to remote
synced.description: This ice box has been verified by reading it back from the remote fridge-config branch.

pending.label: Waiting for remote verification
pending.description: The local record exists, but the remote fridge-config branch has not verified it yet.

failed.label: Remote verification failed
failed.description: The ice box exists locally, but the latest write/read-back check against the remote fridge-config branch failed.

gitBranch.label: Git direct push
gitBranch.description: OpenClaw syncs .openclaw directly to a dedicated branch.

uploadToken.label: Archive upload
uploadToken.description: OpenClaw uploads an archive to the dedicated ice box endpoint, then Claw-Fridge stores it.

daily.description: Good for active machines. Missing once is easy to recover from.

every3Days.description: A balanced cadence for regular work machines.

weekly.description: Good for low-change machines with a calmer default rhythm.

custom.description: Choose your own interval for special workflows.

status.disabledDescription: This ice box will not prompt for backups automatically.
status.waitingBaselineDescription: There is not enough timing data yet to schedule reminders.
status.invalidTimeDescription: The current baseline time is invalid, so the next reminder cannot be calculated yet.
status.waitingFirstBackupDescription: If there is still no first backup in {duration}, a reminder should fire.
status.scheduledDescription: The next reminder window opens in {duration}.
status.dueDescription: The reminder window is open. It became due {duration} ago.
status.overdueDescription: The reminder window passed {duration} ago. A backup is recommended soon.

skillPage.errorHint: Check that the config parameters in the link are complete, then reopen the Skill document from the ice box detail page.
skillPage.unknownError: An unknown error occurred while generating the Skill document. Please try again later.
skillPage.title: {mode} Skill document for {name}
skillPage.description: This page outputs the Markdown you can save directly as `SKILL.md`, along with the install path, Skill link, workflow notes, and whether Git credential placeholders are included.
skillPage.reloadDescription: Keep the filename as `SKILL.md`, then open a new OpenClaw session to confirm the Skill is loaded.
skillPage.markdownDescription: The content below is the final Skill document and can be saved directly as `SKILL.md`. Before sharing, make sure it does not expose a private upload URL, token, or encryption parameters.

clientApi.localApiUnavailable: The local API is temporarily unavailable while {action}.
clientApi.checkDevServer: Make sure the dev server is still running and check the claw-fridge service logs in the terminal.

clientGit.browserNoSsh: SSH repositories are not supported in browser mode. Please use HTTPS + token.
clientGit.browserCannotReachRepo: The browser cannot reach this Git remote directly. It may be blocked by CORS or network policy.
clientGit.corsHelp1: GitHub usually works directly. For self-hosted Git/GitLab/Gitea, check whether cross-origin access is allowed.
clientGit.corsHelp2: If the server does not allow CORS, add a CORS proxy or keep the backend API as a fallback.
clientGit.authFailed: Git repository authentication failed. Check the username and token.
clientGit.fillRepository: Enter the Git repository URL first.
clientGit.browserNoLocalRepo: Browser mode does not support local path repositories. Use a remote HTTPS repository instead.
clientGit.onlyHttpsRepo: Only HTTPS remote repositories are supported right now.
clientGit.remoteBranchMissing: Remote branch {branch} does not exist. Initialize the repository config first.
clientGit.connected: The browser connected to the remote repository successfully.
clientGit.fridgeConfigExists: The `fridge-config` branch already exists. Existing config was kept.
clientGit.loadedFridgeConfig: Loaded the fridge-config branch and kept the existing config.
clientGit.initializedFridgeConfig: Initialized the fridge-config branch in the browser and pushed it to the remote repository.
clientGit.historyBranchMissing: Ice box branch {branch} does not exist.

usernamePlaceholder.sshGeneric: git (change this if your self-hosted SSH setup requires another user)
usernamePlaceholder.github: GitHub username (tries git if left empty)
usernamePlaceholder.gitea: Gitea username (tries git if left empty)
usernamePlaceholder.generic: Platform username / token username (tries git if left empty)

authHelp.githubHttps1: For GitHub HTTPS, PAT / fine-grained PAT is recommended; put the token in the password field.
authHelp.githubHttps2: Use your GitHub username first. For fine-grained tokens, remember to grant content read/write access to the target repository.
authHelp.gitlabHttps1: For GitLab HTTPS, `oauth2` + PAT is common. If you use a Deploy Token, switch to the dedicated username generated by GitLab.
authHelp.gitlabHttps2: GitLab accounts with 2FA enabled can no longer use account passwords and must use a token.
authHelp.giteaHttps1: For Gitea HTTPS, use an Access Token / PAT as the password. The username should usually be your Gitea account name.
authHelp.giteaHttps2: If your self-hosted Gitea instance uses a custom domain or port, use the actual instance address.
authHelp.genericHttps1: Generic HTTPS repositories usually use a token instead of a password. The username may be your account name, `git`, or a server-specific token username.
authHelp.genericHttps2: If this is a self-hosted service, confirm that it supports PAT / Basic Auth pushes first.
authHelp.platformSsh1: {platform} SSH usually uses `git` as the username; the repository URL supports both scp-style and `ssh://` formats.
authHelp.platformSsh2: If you use a custom SSH port, switch to the full format like `ssh://git@host:port/owner/repo.git`.
authHelp.genericSsh1: Generic SSH repositories usually default to `git`, but self-hosted instances may require `gitlab`, `forgejo`, or your system account.
authHelp.genericSsh2: The standard scp format is `git@host:owner/repo.git`; for custom ports, use `ssh://user@host:port/path.git`.

clientIceBox.needGitConfigBeforeSync: Save the Git repository config on the home page before syncing to remote.
clientIceBox.syncFailed: Failed to sync the ice box to remote.
clientIceBox.loadListFailed: Failed to load the ice box list.
clientIceBox.creatingInProgress: Creation is already in progress. Please try again shortly.
clientIceBox.fillName: Enter an ice box name first.
clientIceBox.invalidMachineId: Provide a valid machine-id using only letters, numbers, and hyphens.
clientIceBox.needGitConfigBeforeCreate: Save the Git repository config on the home page before creating an ice box.
clientIceBox.machineIdExists: machine-id `{machineId}` already exists. Choose another one.
clientIceBox.branchExists: Backup branch `{branch}` is already in use. Choose another machine-id.
clientIceBox.generateUploadTokenFailed: Failed to generate the upload token.
clientIceBox.remoteMissingValidatedRecord: Remote returned success, but the validated ice box record is missing.
clientIceBox.createdAndVerified: Ice box created and verified by reading it back from remote.
clientIceBox.createdLocallyPendingVerify: Ice box created locally, but it has not passed remote verification yet. You can retry syncing later.
clientIceBox.missingFromCache: Ice box does not exist and may not be loaded into the local cache yet.
clientIceBox.verifiedByRemote: Verified by reading back from remote.
clientIceBox.noPendingSync: There are no ice boxes waiting to sync.
clientIceBox.partialSync: Synced {syncedCount} ice boxes; {failedCount} still need another retry later.
clientIceBox.pendingSyncNoneSucceeded: None of the pending ice boxes synced to remote yet.
clientIceBox.syncReminderFailed: Failed to sync the reminder config.
clientIceBox.deletedOrNotSynced: Ice box does not exist. It may have been deleted or not synced locally yet.

route.invalidIdentitySyncRequest: Invalid identity sync request. Please provide rootDir.
route.rootDirRequired: rootDir must be a non-empty string.
route.gitConfigObjectRequired: The request body must include a valid Git config object.
route.fetchIceBoxesFailed: The ice box list API failed.
route.iceBoxObjectRequired: The request body must include a valid ice box object with id and name.
route.createIceBoxFailed: The create ice box API failed.
route.updatesFieldRequired: The request body must include the updates field.
route.updateIceBoxFailed: The update ice box API failed.
route.deleteIceBoxFailed: The delete ice box API failed.
route.historyPayloadRequired: The request body must include valid machine-id, branch, and gitConfig information.
route.iceBoxHistoryFailed: The backup history API for ice box `{id}` failed.
route.matchingIceBoxRequired: Please provide matching ice box information.
route.syncItemMustMatchId: The request body must include item, and item.id must match the route parameter.
route.restorePayloadRequired: The request body must contain a valid action and all required restore fields.
route.iceBoxRestoreFailed: The restore API for ice box `{id}` failed.
route.uploadTokenPayloadRequired: The request body must include a valid ice box name, machine-id, and Git config.
route.revokeUploadTokenFailed: The revoke upload token API failed.
route.gitConfigPayloadRequired: The request body must be a valid Git config object.
route.gitConfigInitFailed: The Git config initialization API failed.
route.gitConfigTestFailed: The Git config test API failed.

sync.pushFinishedVerifyFailed: Push completed, but remote readback verification failed.
sync.missingRecordAfterPush: Push completed, but the ice box record was not found in remote fridge-config/ice-boxes.json.
sync.iceBoxListFileMissingYet: The ice box list file does not exist yet.
sync.iceBoxListPulled: The ice box list was fetched from GitHub.
sync.pullIceBoxListFailed: Failed to fetch the ice box list from GitHub.
sync.iceBoxListUnchanged: The ice box list is unchanged.
sync.iceBoxPushedVerifyFailed: Ice box {id} was pushed to the remote, but readback verification failed.
sync.iceBoxSyncedVerified: Ice box {name} was synced to the remote and passed readback verification.
sync.syncIceBoxToGitFailed: Failed to sync the ice box to GitHub.
sync.iceBoxListFileMissing: The ice box list file does not exist.
sync.iceBoxInfoUnchanged: The ice box information is unchanged.
sync.iceBoxUpdatedVerified: Ice box {id} was updated on the remote and passed readback verification.
sync.updateIceBoxToGitFailed: Failed to update the ice box on GitHub.
sync.iceBoxMarkedDeleted: Ice box {name} was marked as deleted and the branch was kept.
sync.markIceBoxDeletedFailed: Failed to mark the ice box as deleted.

git.localRepoPathMissing: The local repository path does not exist.
git.localRepoAvailable: The local Git repository is available.
git.head: HEAD: {head}
git.localRepoInvalid: No valid local Git repository was detected.
git.httpsOnlyForHttpsRepo: HTTPS token auth only supports HTTPS repository URLs.
git.initSshAgentFailed: Failed to initialize SSH agent environment variables.
git.sshOnlyForSshRepo: SSH key auth only supports SSH repository URLs.
git.sshRepoMissingKey: The current repository uses SSH, but no SSH key configuration was provided.
git.fillSshPrivateKey: Please provide the SSH private key.
git.fillHttpsTokenBeforeInit: Provide the HTTPS token before initializing the fridge-config branch.
git.switchToSshKeyForInit: The current repository uses SSH. Switch to SSH key auth before initializing the branch.
git.fillSshKeyBeforeInit: Provide the SSH private key before initializing the fridge-config branch.
git.repoTypeUnknownForInit: Unable to determine the Git repository type, so the fridge-config branch cannot be initialized yet.
git.fillRepoPathOrRemote: Please provide the Git repository path or remote URL first.
git.repoTypeUnknown: Unable to determine the Git repository type.
git.sshNotSupportedForInit: The current repository uses SSH. The initialization flow now uses isomorphic-git, but this implementation does not support SSH push directly.
git.switchToHttpsAndToken: Switch the repository URL to HTTPS and retry with a token.
git.fridgeConfigBranchAlreadyReady: The `fridge-config` branch already exists and the initialization files are complete.
git.fridgeConfigBranchPatchedAndPushed: The `fridge-config` branch was completed and the initialization files were pushed.
git.fridgeConfigBranchInitialized: The `fridge-config` branch was initialized and the config files were pushed.
git.repoNotFoundForInit: No Git repository was found for writing initialization config: {reason}

restore.branchMachineMismatch: Branch `{branch}` does not match machine-id `{machineId}`. Expected `{expectedBranch}`.
restore.targetRequired: Please provide the restore target directory first.
restore.targetMustBeAbsolute: The restore target directory must be an absolute path.
restore.useParentOfOpenclaw: Please provide the parent directory of `.openclaw`, not the directory itself.
restore.targetTooDangerous: The restore target directory is too risky: {path}
restore.validGitConfigRequired: Please provide a valid Git repository config first.
restore.branchNotCreated: Branch `{branch}` does not exist yet, which means this ice box has not produced its first backup.
restore.historyLoaded: Loaded {count} backup history entries from branch `{branch}`.
restore.noHistoryOnBranch: Branch `{branch}` does not have backup history yet.
restore.commitNotInBranch: Commit `{commit}` does not belong to branch `{branch}`.
restore.branchNoBackupButOthers: Target branch `{branch}` has no backups yet. There are still {count} restorable branches in the repository.
restore.noBackupBranches: No `{prefix}` backup branches were found in the current repository.
restore.snapshotNotFound: No restorable snapshot was found for commit `{commit}`.
restore.latestSnapshotLocated: Found the latest backup information for branch `{branch}`.
restore.previewFailed: Failed to load the restore preview.
restore.branchHasNoBackup: Branch `{branch}` currently has no restorable backups.
restore.openclawNotFoundInCommit: No restorable `.openclaw` directory was found in commit `{commit}`.
restore.openclawNotFoundInBranch: No restorable `.openclaw` directory was found in branch `{branch}`.
restore.targetNotDirectory: The restore target is not a directory, so `.openclaw` cannot be written.
restore.confirmRequired: Please confirm the restore action before continuing.
restore.targetAlreadyExists: A `.openclaw` directory already exists in the target location. Confirm overwrite and try again.
restore.restoredWithBackup: The backup was restored (snapshot {commit}), and the original `.openclaw` was moved to a nearby timestamped backup directory first.
restore.restoredToTarget: The backup was restored to the target directory (snapshot {commit}).

upload.fileTooLarge: The uploaded file exceeds the limit (maximum {max}).
upload.invalidTokenStorageFormat: The upload token storage file format is invalid.
upload.tokenHoursRange: Token lifetime must be between 0 and 8760 hours.
upload.iceBoxNameRequired: Ice box name cannot be empty.
upload.tokenGenerated: The upload URL and token have been generated.
upload.tokenGenerateFailed: Failed to generate the upload token.
upload.missingIceBoxIdOrUploadId: Missing a valid ice-box-id or upload-id.
upload.tokenNotFound: The matching upload token was not found.
upload.tokenAlreadyRevoked: The upload token is already revoked.
upload.revokeTokenFailed: Failed to revoke the upload token.
upload.uploadUrlNotFound: The upload URL does not exist.
upload.encryptionNotEnabled: Upload encryption is not enabled for this ice box. Remove the encryption headers and try again.
upload.encryptionRequired: This ice box requires encrypted uploads. Include the encryption headers and master key, then try again.
upload.onlySupportEncryption: Only {algorithm} upload encryption is currently supported.
upload.missingKdfSalt: The ice box encryption config is incomplete: missing KDF salt.
upload.missingIvOrAuthTag: Missing the IV or auth tag required for encrypted upload.
upload.missingMasterKey: Missing the master key for encrypted upload.
upload.invalidIvLength: AES-GCM IV length must be 12 bytes.
upload.invalidAuthTagLength: AES-GCM auth tag length must be 16 bytes.
upload.decryptFailed: The upload key is invalid, or the encrypted file is corrupted and the backup cannot be decrypted.
upload.notGzipArchive: The uploaded file is not a valid gzip archive.
upload.archiveContainsAbsolutePath: The archive contains absolute paths and was rejected.
upload.archiveContainsUnsafePath: The archive contains unsafe paths and was rejected.
upload.archiveMissingOpenclaw: The archive does not contain a `.openclaw` directory.
upload.openclawNotDirectoryAfterExtract: The extracted `.openclaw` is not a directory.
upload.openclawMissingAfterExtract: No `.openclaw` directory was found after extraction.
upload.onlyTarGzOrMultipart: Only raw tar.gz streams or multipart/form-data uploads are supported.
upload.emptyRequestBody: The request body is empty, so the uploaded file cannot be read.
upload.onlyOneFileAllowed: Only one tar.gz file can be uploaded at a time.
upload.encryptedFilenameSuggested: For encrypted uploads, a filename ending in .tar.gz.enc, .enc, or .bin is recommended.
upload.filenameMustBeTarGz: The uploaded filename must end with .tar.gz or .tgz.
upload.fileFieldMissing: No file field was found in the multipart request.
upload.writeUploadFileFailed: Failed to write the uploaded file.
upload.backupUnchangedSkipped: The backup content is unchanged, so commit was skipped.
upload.backupCommittedAndPushed: The backup content was committed and pushed to the remote repository.
upload.iceBoxIdMismatch: The iceBoxId in the request body does not match the upload URL.
upload.processUploadFailed: Failed to process the uploaded backup.

identity.readGeneratedFailed: Failed to read generated identity info: {reason}
identity.noParsableIdentityFiles: No parsable identity files were found. Please provide at least IDENTITY.md, SOUL.md, or USER.md.
identity.identityUnchanged: Identity info is unchanged, so the existing identity.json is reused.
